mcp:tool-listener.name: create_api_spec
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Uses AI to generate a RAML or OAS API specification from a natural language prompt.

mcp:tool-listener.name: create_dw_codeagent
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Uses AI to generate a DW or DWL or Dataweave (version - %dw 2.0) from a natural language prompt.

mcp:tool-listener.name: create_munit_codeagent
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Uses AI to generate a Munit or munit MuleSoft/Mule application testing framework for testing MuleSoft applications from a natural language prompt.

mcp:tool-listener.name: create_mule_codeagent
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Uses AI to generate a MuleSoft/Mule application xml flow / subflow for MuleSoft applications from a natural language prompt.
